title: oenanthe linearis subsp. sinensis
intro: Oenanthe linearis subsp. sinensis, also known as Chinese water parsley or Chinese water celery, is a plant species in the carrot family that is native to China and other parts of East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Oenanthe linearis subsp. sinensis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
